_meta.applies: Birthday events for young children, approximately ages 3–7.
_meta.note: Subtype-specific additions only. Inherits all core tasks/milestones/cost drivers/risks/templates from MOD-BIRTHDAY-CORE; references core IDs (BC-*) where it extends them.

derived_quantities.kid_count: scenario.kid_count (else estimate from guest_count for a kids-only party)

tasks.title: Plan supervision: set adult-to-child ratio and assign watchers
Confirm parent presence (stay vs drop-off) and collect emergency contacts
Plan age-appropriate games (simple, short, plus 1–2 backups)
Keep the schedule short & well-paced (1.5–2h; alternate active/calm; build in wind-down)
Plan & buy favors / goodie bags (per child)
Child-proof & safety-check the space (hazards, choking risks, boundaries, water)
Prepare first-aid kit + allergy action items; note nearest help
Brief helpers on roles, ratio, and the allergy plan before guests arrive
Actively supervise during the party (headcounts, boundaries, water)
Calm wind-down before pickup (quiet activity; avoid over-tired meltdown)
Hand out favors at exit; reunite each child with parent/approved contact

critical_chains.note: Supervision: set ratio → brief helpers → active supervision
Parent contacts → headcounts → reunite correctly at pickup
Games planned → short paced schedule → calm wind-down

resources.name: Safety items (boundary markers, outlet covers as needed)

risks.name: Child supervision lapse
risks.mitigation: Maintain ratio (ST1-T01); brief helpers (ST1-T08); active supervision + headcounts (ST1-T09); secure boundaries/water (ST1-T06).

risks.name: Over-tired / over-sugared meltdown
risks.mitigation: Short paced schedule (ST1-T04); calm wind-down (ST1-T10); pace sweets/cake.

risks.name: Choking / age-inappropriate hazard
risks.mitigation: Child-proof space + age-appropriate food/toys (ST1-T06); first-aid ready (ST1-T07).

risks.name: Games fall flat (short attention span)
risks.mitigation: Simple short games with 1–2 backups (ST1-T03); pacing (ST1-T04).

risks.name: Child leaves with wrong adult / unaccounted
risks.mitigation: Collect parent/approved contacts (ST1-T02); headcounts (ST1-T09); supervised reunite at pickup (ST1-T11).

decision_rules.rule: Set supervision ratio from config (kids_per_adult = 5); supervising_adults = ceil(kid_count / 5).
Default entertainment = DIY simple games; a hired entertainer is opt-in via MOD-OPT-ENTERTAINER.
Favors default ON for this subtype (per child).
Recommend duration 1.5–2h, daytime; warn if requested runtime exceeds 2.5h.
If any children are drop-off, require emergency contacts (activates ST1-RK05 + ST1-T02).
Reinforce core allergy chain (CHAIN-SAFETY): ST1-T08 helper brief must include the allergy plan from BC-T13.

success_conditions.condition: Honoree happy; kids engaged for the (short) duration.
On time, well-paced; calm wind-down; no meltdown crisis.
Every child reunited correctly with parent/approved contact.

failure_modes.mode: Supervision lapse → injury or lost child
